creator: ls@Gambit.Msk.SU
text:
The right answer is:

| $ pgp5
| PGP is now invoked from different executables for different operations:
| 
| pgpe    Encrypt (including Encrypt/Sign)
| pgps    Sign
| pgpv    Verify/Decrypt
| pgpk    Key management
| pgpo    PGP 2.6.2 command-line simulator (not yet implemented)
| 
| See each application's respective man page or the general PGP documentation
| for more information.

On Thu, Oct 14, 1999 at 01:45:11PM -0700, Kris Kennaway wrote:

> Umm, isn't this by design? You're supposed to use pgp[kve...] to
> invoke it depending on which functionality you want.

> On Thu, 14 Oct 1999, ls wrote:

>> 	$ pgp5
>> 	Invoked with unknown symlink
